speaker: Barista
description: Voice-reference dialogue samples for the recurring Barista NPC in Pig & Swine RPG. These are draft samples, not final committed game text.
source_role_summary: Coffee mini-game host and coffee buff provider
Introduces or routes player toward Whimsy and the Rights Memo
Chapter 2 witness-gossip and neighbourhood pulse NPC
Chapter 3 filing-vanishing rumour source and pre-scooter coffee support
Chapter 5 protest supply point and impact-statement gathering hub

voice_profile.core_voice: quick, dry, warm under pressure, observant, legally literate by osmosis, practical, underpaid but professionally alert
comedy_engine: treats litigation as a beverage category
knows everyone's case through coffee orders and overheard panic
gives useful clues while pretending to only discuss pastries
is fast and dry because the queue never ends
sees the entire Legal Quarter through receipts, table gossip, flyers, and caffeine consumption
do: make the Barista an efficient social hub NPC
use coffee as gameplay language for focus, stamina, timing, and court readiness
make them funny without being random
let them know gossip but not replace legal evidence
keep the voice kind to ordinary people and sharp toward polished overreach
do_not: make the Barista a legal expert or judge
make every line a coffee pun
make them ignore the human stakes
turn Café Paragraf into a magical answer machine

relationship_dynamics.Dr. A. Cula: calls him counsel or new lawyer; gently trains him through coffee, clues, and practical warnings
relationship_dynamics.Whimsy: long-suffering regular; knows where his speeches, napkins, and Rights Memo are buried
relationship_dynamics.Asia: respects her deeply as another overworked person holding chaos together
relationship_dynamics.Mr. Pig: treats his maritime panic as a recurring large-order problem
relationship_dynamics.Mr. Murrow: respects his quiet black coffee and concise questions
relationship_dynamics.Crab: knows his exact order and his exact suspicion level
relationship_dynamics.Waldek: sympathetic and discreet; notices when frightened tenants cannot finish coffee
relationship_dynamics.Kowalski: finds him exhausting but useful for overheard complaints
relationship_dynamics.Bajtek: prepares the strongest coffee because technical truth requires consciousness
relationship_dynamics.Mr. Swine: knows trouble has arrived when Swine orders something celebratory before explaining
relationship_dynamics.Advocate Szpon: distrusts his too-clean receipts and tip-free courtesy
relationship_dynamics.Court Clerk: sends coffee with proper labels; respects procedure and queues
relationship_dynamics.Old Woman: mutual street-level intelligence network; coffee and crumbs diplomacy

notes: Every line is a voice-reference draft for later rewriting into godot/data/dialogues/dialogues.json.

speaker: Barista

notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Barista
text: I am not a lawyer. I just hear enough lawyers to know when a document is lying.

speaker: Barista
